verses.esv: And on the seventh day the priest shall examine the itch, and if the itch has not spread in the skin and it appears to be no deeper than the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him clean. And he shall wash his clothes and be clean.
verses.kjv: And in the seventh day the priest shall look on the scall: and, behold, if the scall be not spread in the skin, nor be in sight deeper than the skin; then the priest shall pronounce him clean: and he shall wash his clothes, and be clean.
verses.bsb: On the seventh day the priest shall examine the scaly outbreak, and if it has not spread on the skin and does not appear to be deeper than the skin, the priest is to pronounce him clean. He must wash his clothes, and he will be clean.

verses.esv: But if the itch spreads in the skin after his cleansing,
verses.kjv: But if the scall spread much in the skin after his cleansing;
verses.bsb: If, however, the scaly outbreak spreads further on the skin after his cleansing,

verses.esv: then the priest shall examine him, and if the itch has spread in the skin, the priest need not seek for the yellow hair; he is unclean.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall look on him: and, behold, if the scall be spread in the skin, the priest shall not seek for yellow hair; he is unclean.
verses.bsb: the priest is to examine him, and if the scaly outbreak has spread on the skin, the priest need not look for yellow hair; the person is unclean.

verses.esv: But if in his eyes the itch is unchanged and black hair has grown in it, the itch is healed and he is clean, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
verses.kjv: But if the scall be in his sight at a stay, and that there is black hair grown up therein; the scall is healed, he is clean: and the priest shall pronounce him clean.
verses.bsb: If, however, in his sight the scaly outbreak is unchanged and black hair has grown in it, then it has healed. He is clean, and the priest is to pronounce him clean.

verses.esv: “When a man or a woman has spots on the skin of the body, white spots,
verses.kjv: ¶ If a man also or a woman have in the skin of their flesh bright spots, even white bright spots;
verses.bsb: When a man or a woman has white spots on the skin,

verses.esv: the priest shall look, and if the spots on the skin of the body are of a dull white, it is leukoderma that has broken out in the skin; he is clean.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall look: and, behold, if the bright spots in the skin of their flesh be darkish white; it is a freckled spot that groweth in the skin; he is clean.
verses.bsb: the priest shall examine them, and if the spots are dull white, it is a harmless rash that has broken out on the skin; the person is clean.

verses.esv: “If a man's hair falls out from his head, he is bald; he is clean.
verses.kjv: And the man whose hair is fallen off his head, he is bald; yet is he clean.
verses.bsb: Now if a man loses his hair and is bald, he is still clean.

verses.esv: And if a man's hair falls out from his forehead, he has baldness of the forehead; he is clean.
verses.kjv: And he that hath his hair fallen off from the part of his head toward his face, he is forehead bald: yet is he clean.
verses.bsb: Or if his hairline recedes and he is bald on his forehead, he is still clean.

verses.esv: But if there is on the bald head or the bald forehead a reddish-white diseased area, it is a leprous disease breaking out on his bald head or his bald forehead.
verses.kjv: And if there be in the bald head, or bald forehead, a white reddish sore; it is a leprosy sprung up in his bald head, or his bald forehead.
verses.bsb: But if there is a reddish-white sore on the bald head or forehead, it is an infectious disease breaking out on it.

verses.esv: Then the priest shall examine him, and if the diseased swelling is reddish-white on his bald head or on his bald forehead, like the appearance of leprous disease in the skin of the body,
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall look upon it: and, behold, if the rising of the sore be white reddish in his bald head, or in his bald forehead, as the leprosy appeareth in the skin of the flesh;
verses.bsb: The priest is to examine him, and if the swelling of the infection on his bald head or forehead is reddish-white like a skin disease,

verses.esv: he is a leprous man, he is unclean. The priest must pronounce him unclean; his disease is on his head.
verses.kjv: He is a leprous man, he is unclean: the priest shall pronounce him utterly unclean; his plague is in his head.
verses.bsb: the man is diseased; he is unclean. The priest must pronounce him unclean because of the infection on his head.

verses.esv: “The leprous person who has the disease shall wear torn clothes and let the hair of his head hang loose, and he shall cover his upper lip and cry out, ‘Unclean, unclean.’
verses.kjv: And the leper in whom the plague is, his clothes shall be rent, and his head bare, and he shall put a covering upon his upper lip, and shall cry, Unclean, unclean.
verses.bsb: A diseased person must wear torn clothes and let his hair hang loose, and he must cover his mouth and cry out, ‘Unclean, unclean!’

verses.esv: He shall remain unclean as long as he has the disease. He is unclean. He shall live alone. His dwelling shall be outside the camp.
verses.kjv: All the days wherein the plague shall be in him he shall be defiled; he is unclean: he shall dwell alone; without the camp shall his habitation be.
verses.bsb: As long as he has the infection, he remains unclean. He must live alone in a place outside the camp.

verses.esv: “When there is a case of leprous disease in a garment, whether a woolen or a linen garment,
verses.kjv: ¶ The garment also that the plague of leprosy is in, whether it be a woollen garment, or a linen garment;
verses.bsb: If any fabric is contaminated with mildew—any wool or linen garment,

verses.esv: in warp or woof of linen or wool, or in a skin or in anything made of skin,
verses.kjv: Whether it be in the warp, or woof; of linen, or of woollen; whether in a skin, or in any thing made of skin;
verses.bsb: any weave or knit of linen or wool, or any article of leather—

verses.esv: if the disease is greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin or in the warp or the woof or in any article made of skin, it is a case of leprous disease, and it shall be shown to the priest.
verses.kjv: And if the plague be greenish or reddish in the garment, or in the skin, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin; it is a plague of leprosy, and shall be shewed unto the priest:
verses.bsb: and if the mark in the fabric, leather, weave, knit, or leather article is green or red, then it is contaminated with mildew and must be shown to the priest.

verses.esv: And the priest shall examine the disease and shut up that which has the disease for seven days.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall look upon the plague, and shut up it that hath the plague seven days:
verses.bsb: And the priest is to examine the mildew and isolate the contaminated fabric for seven days.

verses.esv: Then he shall examine the disease on the seventh day. If the disease has spread in the garment, in the warp or the woof, or in the skin, whatever be the use of the skin, the disease is a persistent leprous disease; it is unclean.
verses.kjv: And he shall look on the plague on the seventh day: if the plague be spread in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in a skin, or in any work that is made of skin; the plague is a fretting leprosy; it is unclean.
verses.bsb: On the seventh day the priest shall reexamine it, and if the mildew has spread in the fabric, weave, knit, or leather, then regardless of how it is used, it is a harmful mildew; the article is unclean.

verses.esv: And he shall burn the garment, or the warp or the woof, the wool or the linen, or any article made of skin that is diseased, for it is a persistent leprous disease. It shall be burned in the fire.
verses.kjv: He shall therefore burn that garment, whether warp or woof, in woollen or in linen, or any thing of skin, wherein the plague is: for it is a fretting leprosy; it shall be burnt in the fire.
verses.bsb: He is to burn the fabric, weave, or knit, whether the contaminated item is wool or linen or leather. Since the mildew is harmful, the article must be burned up.

verses.esv: “And if the priest examines, and if the disease has not spread in the garment, in the warp or the woof or in any article made of skin,
verses.kjv: And if the priest shall look, and, behold, the plague be not spread in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin;
verses.bsb: But when the priest reexamines it, if the mildew has not spread in the fabric, weave, knit, or leather article,

verses.esv: then the priest shall command that they wash the thing in which is the disease, and he shall shut it up for another seven days.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they wash the thing wherein the plague is, and he shall shut it up seven days more:
verses.bsb: the priest is to order the contaminated article to be washed and isolated for another seven days.

verses.esv: And the priest shall examine the diseased thing after it has been washed. And if the appearance of the diseased area has not changed, though the disease has not spread, it is unclean. You shall burn it in the fire, whether the rot is on the back or on the front.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall look on the plague, after that it is washed: and, behold, if the plague have not changed his colour, and the plague be not spread; it is unclean; thou shalt burn it in the fire; it is fret inward, whether it be bare within or without.
verses.bsb: After it has been washed, the priest is to reexamine it, and if the mildewed article has not changed in appearance, it is unclean. Even though the mildew has not spread, you must burn it, whether the rot is on the front or back.

verses.esv: “But if the priest examines, and if the diseased area has faded after it has been washed, he shall tear it out of the garment or the skin or the warp or the woof.
verses.kjv: And if the priest look, and, behold, the plague be somewhat dark after the washing of it; then he shall rend it out of the garment, or out of the skin, or out of the warp, or out of the woof:
verses.bsb: If the priest examines it and the mildew has faded after it has been washed, he must cut the contaminated section out of the fabric, leather, weave, or knit.

verses.esv: Then if it appears again in the garment, in the warp or the woof, or in any article made of skin, it is spreading. You shall burn with fire whatever has the disease.
verses.kjv: And if it appear still in the garment, either in the warp, or in the woof, or in any thing of skin; it is a spreading plague: thou shalt burn that wherein the plague is with fire.
verses.bsb: But if it reappears in the fabric, weave, or knit, or on any leather article, it is spreading. You must burn the contaminated article.

verses.esv: But the garment, or the warp or the woof, or any article made of skin from which the disease departs when you have washed it, shall then be washed a second time, and be clean.”
verses.kjv: And the garment, either warp, or woof, or whatsoever thing of skin it be, which thou shalt wash, if the plague be departed from them, then it shall be washed the second time, and shall be clean.
verses.bsb: If the mildew disappears from the fabric, weave, or knit, or any leather article after washing, then it is to be washed again, and it will be clean.

verses.esv: This is the law for a case of leprous disease in a garment of wool or linen, either in the warp or the woof, or in any article made of skin, to determine whether it is clean or unclean.
verses.kjv: This is the law of the plague of leprosy in a garment of woollen or linen, either in the warp, or woof, or any thing of skins, to pronounce it clean, or to pronounce it unclean.
verses.bsb: This is the law concerning a mildew contamination in wool or linen fabric, weave, or knit, or any leather article, for pronouncing it clean or unclean.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “This shall be the law of the leprous person for the day of his cleansing. He shall be brought to the priest,
verses.kjv: This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: He shall be brought unto the priest:
verses.bsb: “This is the law for the one afflicted with a skin disease on the day of his cleansing, when he is brought to the priest.

verses.esv: and the priest shall go out of the camp, and the priest shall look. Then, if the case of leprous disease is healed in the leprous person,
verses.kjv: And the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper;
verses.bsb: The priest is to go outside the camp to examine him, and if the skin disease of the afflicted person has healed,

verses.esv: the priest shall command them to take for him who is to be cleansed two live clean birds and cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop.
verses.kjv: Then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two birds alive and clean, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:
verses.bsb: the priest shall order that two live clean birds, cedar wood, scarlet yarn, and hyssop be brought for the one to be cleansed.

verses.esv: And the priest shall command them to kill one of the birds in an earthenware vessel over fresh water.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall command that one of the birds be killed in an earthen vessel over running water:
verses.bsb: Then the priest shall command that one of the birds be slaughtered over fresh water in a clay pot.

verses.esv: He shall take the live bird with the cedarwood and the scarlet yarn and the hyssop, and dip them and the live bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the fresh water.
verses.kjv: As for the living bird, he shall take it, and the cedar wood, and the scarlet, and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the living bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the running water:
verses.bsb: And he is to take the live bird together with the cedar wood, scarlet yarn, and hyssop, and dip them into the blood of the bird that was slaughtered over the fresh water.

verses.esv: And he shall sprinkle it seven times on him who is to be cleansed of the leprous disease. Then he shall pronounce him clean and shall let the living bird go into the open field.
verses.kjv: And he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times, and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let the living bird loose into the open field.
verses.bsb: Seven times he shall sprinkle the one to be cleansed of the skin disease. Then he shall pronounce him clean and release the live bird into the open field.

verses.esv: And he who is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes and shave off all his hair and bathe himself in water, and he shall be clean. And after that he may come into the camp, but live outside his tent seven days.
verses.kjv: And he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes, and shave off all his hair, and wash himself in water, that he may be clean: and after that he shall come into the camp, and shall tarry abroad out of his tent seven days.
verses.bsb: The one being cleansed must wash his clothes, shave off all his hair, and bathe with water; then he will be ceremonially clean. Afterward, he may enter the camp, but he must remain outside his tent for seven days.

verses.esv: And on the seventh day he shall shave off all his hair from his head, his beard, and his eyebrows. He shall shave off all his hair, and then he shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and he shall be clean.
verses.kjv: But it shall be on the seventh day, that he shall shave all his hair off his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair he shall shave off: and he shall wash his clothes, also he shall wash his flesh in water, and he shall be clean.
verses.bsb: On the seventh day he must shave off all his hair—his head, his beard, his eyebrows, and the rest of his hair. He must wash his clothes and bathe himself with water, and he will be clean.

verses.esv: “And on the eighth day he shall take two male lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb a year old without blemish, and a grain offering of three tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, and one log of oil.
verses.kjv: And on the eighth day he shall take two he lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb of the first year without blemish, and three tenth deals of fine flour for a meat offering, mingled with oil, and one log of oil.
verses.bsb: On the eighth day he is to bring two unblemished male lambs, an unblemished ewe lamb a year old, a grain offering of three-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with olive oil, and one log of olive oil.

verses.esv: And the priest who cleanses him shall set the man who is to be cleansed and these things before the LORD, at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: And the priest that maketh him clean shall present the man that is to be made clean, and those things, before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation:
verses.bsb: The priest who performs the cleansing shall present the one to be cleansed, together with these offerings, before the LORD at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: And the priest shall take one of the male lambs and offer it for a guilt offering, along with the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall take one he lamb, and offer him for a trespass offering, and the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the Lord:
verses.bsb: Then the priest is to take one of the male lambs and present it as a guilt offering, along with the log of olive oil; and he must wave them as a wave offering before the LORD.

verses.esv: And he shall kill the lamb in the place where they kill the sin offering and the burnt offering, in the place of the sanctuary. For the guilt offering, like the sin offering, belongs to the priest; it is most holy.
verses.kjv: And he shall slay the lamb in the place where he shall kill the sin offering and the burnt offering, in the holy place: for as the sin offering is the priest’s, so is the trespass offering: it is most holy:
verses.bsb: Then he is to slaughter the lamb in the sanctuary area where the sin offering and burnt offering are slaughtered. Like the sin offering, the guilt offering belongs to the priest; it is most holy.

verses.esv: The priest shall take some of the blood of the guilt offering, and the priest shall put it on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and the priest shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:
verses.bsb: The priest is to take some of the blood from the guilt offering and put it on the right earlobe of the one to be cleansed, on the thumb of his right hand, and on the big toe of his right foot.

verses.esv: Then the priest shall take some of the log of oil and pour it into the palm of his own left hand
verses.kjv: And the priest shall take some of the log of oil, and pour it into the palm of his own left hand:
verses.bsb: Then the priest shall take some of the log of olive oil, pour it into his left palm,

verses.esv: and dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand and sprinkle some oil with his finger seven times before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand, and shall sprinkle of the oil with his finger seven times before the Lord:
verses.bsb: dip his right forefinger into the oil in his left palm, and sprinkle some of the oil with his finger seven times before the LORD.

verses.esv: And some of the oil that remains in his hand the priest shall put on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot, on top of the blood of the guilt offering.
verses.kjv: And of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the blood of the trespass offering:
verses.bsb: And the priest is to put some of the oil remaining in his palm on the right earlobe of the one to be cleansed, on the thumb of his right hand, and on the big toe of his right foot, on top of the blood of the guilt offering.

verses.esv: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest's hand he shall put on the head of him who is to be cleansed. Then the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the remnant of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall pour upon the head of him that is to be cleansed: and the priest shall make an atonement for him before the Lord.
verses.bsb: The rest of the oil in his palm, the priest is to put on the head of the one to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the LORD.

verses.esv: The priest shall offer the sin offering, to make atonement for him who is to be cleansed from his uncleanness. And afterward he shall kill the burnt offering.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall offer the sin offering, and make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed from his uncleanness; and afterward he shall kill the burnt offering:
verses.bsb: Then the priest is to sacrifice the sin offering and make atonement for the one to be cleansed from his uncleanness. After that, the priest shall slaughter the burnt offering

verses.esv: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the grain offering on the altar. Thus the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be clean.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the meat offering upon the altar: and the priest shall make an atonement for him, and he shall be clean.
verses.bsb: and offer it on the altar, with the grain offering, to make atonement for him, and he will be clean.

verses.esv: “But if he is poor and cannot afford so much, then he shall take one male lamb for a guilt offering to be waved, to make atonement for him, and a tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, and a log of oil;
verses.kjv: And if he be poor, and cannot get so much; then he shall take one lamb for a trespass offering to be waved, to make an atonement for him, and one tenth deal of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering, and a log of oil;
verses.bsb: If, however, the person is poor and cannot afford these offerings, he is to take one male lamb as a guilt offering to be waved to make atonement for him, along with a tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with olive oil for a grain offering, a log of olive oil,

verses.esv: also two turtledoves or two pigeons, whichever he can afford. The one shall be a sin offering and the other a burnt offering.
verses.kjv: And two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, such as he is able to get; and the one shall be a sin offering, and the other a burnt offering.
verses.bsb: and two turtledoves or two young pigeons, whichever he can afford, one to be a sin offering and the other a burnt offering.

verses.esv: And on the eighth day he shall bring them for his cleansing to the priest, to the entrance of the tent of meeting, before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And he shall bring them on the eighth day for his cleansing unto the priest, unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, before the Lord.
verses.bsb: On the eighth day he is to bring them for his cleansing to the priest at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting before the LORD.

verses.esv: And the priest shall take the lamb of the guilt offering and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall take the lamb of the trespass offering, and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the Lord:
verses.bsb: The priest shall take the lamb for the guilt offering, along with the log of olive oil, and wave them as a wave offering before the LORD.

verses.esv: And he shall kill the lamb of the guilt offering. And the priest shall take some of the blood of the guilt offering and put it on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed, and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.
verses.kjv: And he shall kill the lamb of the trespass offering, and the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:
verses.bsb: And after he slaughters the lamb for the guilt offering, the priest is to take some of the blood of the guilt offering and put it on the right earlobe of the one to be cleansed, on the thumb of his right hand, and on the big toe of his right foot.

verses.esv: And the priest shall pour some of the oil into the palm of his own left hand,
verses.kjv: And the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand:
verses.bsb: Then the priest is to pour some of the oil into his left palm

verses.esv: and shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the Lord:
verses.bsb: and sprinkle with his right forefinger some of the oil in his left palm seven times before the LORD.

verses.esv: And the priest shall put some of the oil that is in his hand on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot, in the place where the blood of the guilt offering was put.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the place of the blood of the trespass offering:
verses.bsb: The priest shall also put some of the oil in his palm on the right earlobe of the one to be cleansed, on the thumb of his right hand, and on the big toe of his right foot—on the same places as the blood of the guilt offering.

verses.esv: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest's hand he shall put on the head of him who is to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed, to make an atonement for him before the Lord.
verses.bsb: The rest of the oil in his palm, the priest is to put on the head of the one to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the LORD.

verses.esv: And he shall offer, of the turtledoves or pigeons, whichever he can afford,
verses.kjv: And he shall offer the one of the turtledoves, or of the young pigeons, such as he can get;
verses.bsb: Then he must sacrifice the turtledoves or young pigeons, whichever he can afford,

verses.esv: one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering, along with a grain offering. And the priest shall make atonement before the LORD for him who is being cleansed.
verses.kjv: Even such as he is able to get, the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering, with the meat offering: and the priest shall make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed before the Lord.
verses.bsb: one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering, together with the grain offering. In this way the priest will make atonement before the LORD for the one to be cleansed.

verses.esv: This is the law for him in whom is a case of leprous disease, who cannot afford the offerings for his cleansing.”
verses.kjv: This is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy, whose hand is not able to get that which pertaineth to his cleansing.
verses.bsb: This is the law for someone who has a skin disease and cannot afford the cost of his cleansing.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,

verses.esv: “When you come into the land of Canaan, which I give you for a possession, and I put a case of leprous disease in a house in the land of your possession,
verses.kjv: When ye be come into the land of Canaan, which I give to you for a possession, and I put the plague of leprosy in a house of the land of your possession;
verses.bsb: “When you enter the land of Canaan, which I am giving you as your possession, and I put a contamination of mildew into a house in that land,

verses.esv: then he who owns the house shall come and tell the priest, ‘There seems to me to be some case of disease in my house.’
verses.kjv: And he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest, saying, It seemeth to me there is as it were a plague in the house:
verses.bsb: the owner of the house shall come and tell the priest, ‘Something like mildew has appeared in my house.’

verses.esv: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house before the priest goes to examine the disease, lest all that is in the house be declared unclean. And afterward the priest shall go in to see the house.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house, before the priest go into it to see the plague, that all that is in the house be not made unclean: and afterward the priest shall go in to see the house:
verses.bsb: The priest must order that the house be cleared before he enters it to examine the mildew, so that nothing in the house will become unclean. After this, the priest shall go in to inspect the house.

verses.esv: And he shall examine the disease. And if the disease is in the walls of the house with greenish or reddish spots, and if it appears to be deeper than the surface,
verses.kjv: And he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague be in the walls of the house with hollow strakes, greenish or reddish, which in sight are lower than the wall;
verses.bsb: He is to examine the house, and if the mildew on the walls consists of green or red depressions that appear to be beneath the surface of the wall,

verses.esv: then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house and shut up the house seven days.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house, and shut up the house seven days:
verses.bsb: the priest shall go outside the doorway of the house and close it up for seven days.

verses.esv: And the priest shall come again on the seventh day, and look. If the disease has spread in the walls of the house,
verses.kjv: And the priest shall come again the seventh day, and shall look: and, behold, if the plague be spread in the walls of the house;
verses.bsb: On the seventh day the priest is to return and inspect the house. If the mildew has spread on the walls,

verses.esv: then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which is the disease and throw them into an unclean place outside the city.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they take away the stones in which the plague is, and they shall cast them into an unclean place without the city:
verses.bsb: he must order that the contaminated stones be pulled out and thrown into an unclean place outside the city.

verses.esv: And he shall have the inside of the house scraped all around, and the plaster that they scrape off they shall pour out in an unclean place outside the city.
verses.kjv: And he shall cause the house to be scraped within round about, and they shall pour out the dust that they scrape off without the city into an unclean place:
verses.bsb: And he shall have the inside of the house scraped completely and the plaster that is scraped off dumped into an unclean place outside the city.

verses.esv: Then they shall take other stones and put them in the place of those stones, and he shall take other plaster and plaster the house.
verses.kjv: And they shall take other stones, and put them in the place of those stones; and he shall take other morter, and shall plaister the house.
verses.bsb: So different stones must be obtained to replace the contaminated ones, as well as additional mortar to replaster the house.

verses.esv: “If the disease breaks out again in the house, after he has taken out the stones and scraped the house and plastered it,
verses.kjv: And if the plague come again, and break out in the house, after that he hath taken away the stones, and after he hath scraped the house, and after it is plaistered;
verses.bsb: If the mildew reappears in the house after the stones have been torn out and the house has been scraped and replastered,

verses.esv: then the priest shall go and look. And if the disease has spread in the house, it is a persistent leprous disease in the house; it is unclean.
verses.kjv: Then the priest shall come and look, and, behold, if the plague be spread in the house, it is a fretting leprosy in the house: it is unclean.
verses.bsb: the priest must come and inspect it.  If the mildew has spread in the house, it is a destructive mildew; the house is unclean.

verses.esv: And he shall break down the house, its stones and timber and all the plaster of the house, and he shall carry them out of the city to an unclean place.
verses.kjv: And he shall break down the house, the stones of it, and the timber thereof, and all the morter of the house; and he shall carry them forth out of the city into an unclean place.
verses.bsb: It must be torn down with its stones, its timbers, and all its plaster, and taken outside the city to an unclean place.

verses.esv: Moreover, whoever enters the house while it is shut up shall be unclean until the evening,
verses.kjv: Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Anyone who enters the house during any of the days that it is closed up will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: and whoever sleeps in the house shall wash his clothes, and whoever eats in the house shall wash his clothes.
verses.kjv: And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.
verses.bsb: And anyone who sleeps in the house or eats in it must wash his clothes.

verses.esv: “But if the priest comes and looks, and if the disease has not spread in the house after the house was plastered, then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, for the disease is healed.
verses.kjv: And if the priest shall come in, and look upon it, and, behold, the plague hath not spread in the house, after the house was plaistered: then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, because the plague is healed.
verses.bsb: If, however, the priest comes and inspects it, and the mildew has not spread after the house has been replastered, he shall pronounce the house clean, because the mildew is gone.

verses.esv: And for the cleansing of the house he shall take two small birds, with cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop,
verses.kjv: And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:
verses.bsb: He is to take two birds, cedar wood, scarlet yarn, and hyssop to purify the house;

verses.esv: and shall kill one of the birds in an earthenware vessel over fresh water
verses.kjv: And he shall kill the one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water:
verses.bsb: and he shall slaughter one of the birds over fresh water in a clay pot.

verses.esv: and shall take the cedarwood and the hyssop and the scarlet yarn, along with the live bird, and dip them in the blood of the bird that was killed and in the fresh water and sprinkle the house seven times.
verses.kjv: And he shall take the cedar wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird, and in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times:
verses.bsb: Then he shall take the cedar wood, the hyssop, the scarlet yarn, and the live bird, dip them in the blood of the slaughtered bird and the fresh water, and sprinkle the house seven times.

verses.esv: Thus he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird and with the fresh water and with the live bird and with the cedarwood and hyssop and scarlet yarn.
verses.kjv: And he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar wood, and with the hyssop, and with the scarlet:
verses.bsb: And he shall cleanse the house with the bird’s blood, the fresh water, the live bird, the cedar wood, the hyssop, and the scarlet yarn.

verses.esv: And he shall let the live bird go out of the city into the open country. So he shall make atonement for the house, and it shall be clean.”
verses.kjv: But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open fields, and make an atonement for the house: and it shall be clean.
verses.bsb: Finally, he is to release the live bird into the open fields outside the city. In this way he will make atonement for the house, and it will be clean.

verses.esv: This is the law for any case of leprous disease: for an itch,
verses.kjv: This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy, and scall,
verses.bsb: This is the law for any infectious skin disease, for a scaly outbreak,

verses.esv: for leprous disease in a garment or in a house,
verses.kjv: And for the leprosy of a garment, and of a house,
verses.bsb: for mildew in clothing or in a house,

verses.esv: and for a swelling or an eruption or a spot,
verses.kjv: And for a rising, and for a scab, and for a bright spot:
verses.bsb: and for a swelling, rash, or spot,

verses.esv: to show when it is unclean and when it is clean. This is the law for leprous disease.
verses.kjv: To teach when it is unclean, and when it is clean: this is the law of leprosy.
verses.bsb: to determine when something is clean or unclean. This is the law regarding skin diseases and mildew.”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses and to Aaron, saying,
verses.bsb: And the LORD said to Moses and Aaron,

verses.esv: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When any man has a discharge from his body, his discharge is unclean.
verses.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When any man hath a running issue out of his flesh, because of his issue he is unclean.
verses.bsb: “Say to the Israelites, ‘When any man has a bodily discharge, the discharge is unclean.

verses.esv: And this is the law of his uncleanness for a discharge: whether his body runs with his discharge, or his body is blocked up by his discharge, it is his uncleanness.
verses.kjv: And this shall be his uncleanness in his issue: whether his flesh run with his issue, or his flesh be stopped from his issue, it is his uncleanness.
verses.bsb: This uncleanness is from his discharge, whether his body allows the discharge to flow or blocks it. So his discharge will bring about uncleanness.

verses.esv: Every bed on which the one with the discharge lies shall be unclean, and everything on which he sits shall be unclean.
verses.kjv: Every bed, whereon he lieth that hath the issue, is unclean: and every thing, whereon he sitteth, shall be unclean.
verses.bsb: Any bed on which the man with the discharge lies will be unclean, and any furniture on which he sits will be unclean.

verses.esv: And anyone who touches his bed shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whosoever toucheth his bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Anyone who touches his bed must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And whoever sits on anything on which the one with the discharge has sat shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And he that sitteth on any thing whereon he sat that hath the issue shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Whoever sits on furniture on which the man with the discharge was sitting must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And whoever touches the body of the one with the discharge shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And he that toucheth the flesh of him that hath the issue shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Whoever touches the body of the man with a discharge must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And if the one with the discharge spits on someone who is clean, then he shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And if he that hath the issue spit upon him that is clean; then he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: If the man with the discharge spits on one who is clean, that person must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And any saddle on which the one with the discharge rides shall be unclean.
verses.kjv: And what saddle soever he rideth upon that hath the issue shall be unclean.
verses.bsb: Any saddle on which the man with the discharge rides will be unclean.

verses.esv: And whoever touches anything that was under him shall be unclean until the evening. And whoever carries such things shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whosoever toucheth any thing that was under him shall be unclean until the even: and he that beareth any of those things shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Whoever touches anything that was under him will be unclean until evening, and whoever carries such things must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: Anyone whom the one with the discharge touches without having rinsed his hands in water shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whomsoever he toucheth that hath the issue, and hath not rinsed his hands in water, he shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: If the man with the discharge touches anyone without first rinsing his hands with water, the one who was touched must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And an earthenware vessel that the one with the discharge touches shall be broken, and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.
verses.kjv: And the vessel of earth, that he toucheth which hath the issue, shall be broken: and every vessel of wood shall be rinsed in water.
verses.bsb: Any clay pot that the man with the discharge touches must be broken, and any wooden utensil must be rinsed with water.

verses.esv: “And when the one with a discharge is cleansed of his discharge, then he shall count for himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes. And he shall bathe his body in fresh water and shall be clean.
verses.kjv: And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue; then he shall number to himself seven days for his cleansing, and wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in running water, and shall be clean.
verses.bsb: When the man has been cleansed from his discharge, he must count off seven days for his cleansing, wash his clothes, and bathe himself in fresh water, and he shall be clean.

verses.esv: And on the eighth day he shall take two turtledoves or two pigeons and come before the LORD to the entrance of the tent of meeting and give them to the priest.
verses.kjv: And on the eighth day he shall take to him two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, and come before the Lord unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and give them unto the priest:
verses.bsb: On the eighth day he is to take two turtledoves or two young pigeons, come before the LORD at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, and give them to the priest.

verses.esv: And the priest shall use them, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. And the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD for his discharge.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall offer them, the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering; and the priest shall make an atonement for him before the Lord for his issue.
verses.bsb: The priest is to sacrifice them, one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering. In this way the priest will make atonement for the man before the LORD because of his discharge.

verses.esv: “If a man has an emission of semen, he shall bathe his whole body in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And if any man’s seed of copulation go out from him, then he shall wash all his flesh in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: When a man has an emission of semen, he must bathe his whole body with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And every garment and every skin on which the semen comes shall be washed with water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And every garment, and every skin, whereon is the seed of copulation, shall be washed with water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Any clothing or leather on which there is an emission of semen must be washed with water, and it will remain unclean until evening.

verses.esv: If a man lies with a woman and has an emission of semen, both of them shall bathe themselves in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: The woman also with whom man shall lie with seed of copulation, they shall both bathe themselves in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: If a man lies with a woman and there is an emission of semen, both must bathe with water, and they will remain unclean until evening.

verses.esv: “When a woman has a discharge, and the discharge in her body is blood, she shall be in her menstrual impurity for seven days, and whoever touches her shall be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: ¶ And if a woman have an issue, and her issue in her flesh be blood, she shall be put apart seven days: and whosoever toucheth her shall be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: When a woman has a discharge consisting of blood from her body, she will be unclean due to her menstruation for seven days, and anyone who touches her will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And everything on which she lies during her menstrual impurity shall be unclean. Everything also on which she sits shall be unclean.
verses.kjv: And every thing that she lieth upon in her separation shall be unclean: every thing also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean.
verses.bsb: Anything on which she lies or sits during her menstruation will be unclean,

verses.esv: And whoever touches her bed shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whosoever toucheth her bed shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: and anyone who touches her bed must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And whoever touches anything on which she sits shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whosoever toucheth any thing that she sat upon shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Whoever touches any furniture on which she was sitting must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: Whether it is the bed or anything on which she sits, when he touches it he shall be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And if it be on her bed, or on any thing whereon she sitteth, when he toucheth it, he shall be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: And whether it is a bed or furniture on which she was sitting, whoever touches it will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: And if any man lies with her and her menstrual impurity comes upon him, he shall be unclean seven days, and every bed on which he lies shall be unclean.
verses.kjv: And if any man lie with her at all, and her flowers be upon him, he shall be unclean seven days; and all the bed whereon he lieth shall be unclean.
verses.bsb: If a man lies with her and her menstrual flow touches him, he will be unclean for seven days, and any bed on which he lies will become unclean.

verses.esv: “If a woman has a discharge of blood for many days, not at the time of her menstrual impurity, or if she has a discharge beyond the time of her impurity, all the days of the discharge she shall continue in uncleanness. As in the days of her impurity, she shall be unclean.
verses.kjv: And if a woman have an issue of her blood many days out of the time of her separation, or if it run beyond the time of her separation; all the days of the issue of her uncleanness shall be as the days of her separation: she shall be unclean.
verses.bsb: When a woman has a discharge of her blood for many days at a time other than her menstrual period, or if it continues beyond her period, she will be unclean all the days of her unclean discharge, just as she is during the days of her menstruation.

verses.esv: Every bed on which she lies, all the days of her discharge, shall be to her as the bed of her impurity. And everything on which she sits shall be unclean, as in the uncleanness of her menstrual impurity.
verses.kjv: Every bed whereon she lieth all the days of her issue shall be unto her as the bed of her separation: and whatsoever she sitteth upon shall be unclean, as the uncleanness of her separation.
verses.bsb: Any bed on which she lies or any furniture on which she sits during the days of her discharge will be unclean, like her bed during her menstrual period.

verses.esv: And whoever touches these things shall be unclean, and shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.
verses.kjv: And whosoever toucheth those things shall be unclean, and shall wash his clothes, and bathe himself in water, and be unclean until the even.
verses.bsb: Anyone who touches these things will be unclean; he must wash his clothes and bathe with water, and he will be unclean until evening.

verses.esv: But if she is cleansed of her discharge, she shall count for herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.
verses.kjv: But if she be cleansed of her issue, then she shall number to herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.
verses.bsb: When a woman is cleansed of her discharge, she must count off seven days, and after that she will be ceremonially clean.

verses.esv: And on the eighth day she shall take two turtledoves or two pigeons and bring them to the priest, to the entrance of the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: And on the eighth day she shall take unto her two turtles, or two young pigeons, and bring them unto the priest, to the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: On the eighth day she is to take two turtledoves or two young pigeons and bring them to the priest at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: And the priest shall use one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering. And the priest shall make atonement for her before the LORD for her unclean discharge.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall offer the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering; and the priest shall make an atonement for her before the Lord for the issue of her uncleanness.
verses.bsb: The priest is to sacrifice one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering. In this way the priest will make atonement for her before the LORD for her unclean discharge.

verses.esv: “Thus you shall keep the people of Israel separate from their uncleanness, lest they die in their uncleanness by defiling my tabernacle that is in their midst.”
verses.kjv: Thus shall ye separate the children of Israel from their uncleanness; that they die not in their uncleanness, when they defile my tabernacle that is among them.
verses.bsb: You must keep the children of Israel separate from their uncleanness, so that they do not die by defiling My tabernacle, which is among them.

verses.esv: This is the law for him who has a discharge and for him who has an emission of semen, becoming unclean thereby;
verses.kjv: This is the law of him that hath an issue, and of him whose seed goeth from him, and is defiled therewith;
verses.bsb: This is the law of him who has a discharge, of the man who has an emission of semen whereby he is unclean,

verses.esv: also for her who is unwell with her menstrual impurity, that is, for anyone, male or female, who has a discharge, and for the man who lies with a woman who is unclean.
verses.kjv: And of her that is sick of her flowers, and of him that hath an issue, of the man, and of the woman, and of him that lieth with her that is unclean.
verses.bsb: of a woman in her menstrual period, of any male or female who has a discharge, and of a man who lies with an unclean woman.’”

verses.esv: The LORD spoke to Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they drew near before the LORD and died,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses after the death of the two sons of Aaron, when they offered before the Lord, and died;
verses.bsb: Now the LORD spoke to Moses after the death of two of Aaron’s sons when they approached the presence of the LORD.

verses.esv: and the LORD said to Moses, “Tell Aaron your brother not to come at any time into the Holy Place inside the veil, before the mercy seat that is on the ark, so that he may not die. For I will appear in the cloud over the mercy seat.
verses.kjv: And the Lord said unto Moses, Speak unto Aaron thy brother, that he come not at all times into the holy place within the vail before the mercy seat, which is upon the ark; that he die not: for I will appear in the cloud upon the mercy seat.
verses.bsb: And the LORD said to Moses: “Tell your brother Aaron not to enter freely into the Most Holy Place behind the veil in front of the mercy seat on the ark, or else he will die, because I appear in the cloud above the mercy seat.

verses.esv: But in this way Aaron shall come into the Holy Place: with a bull from the herd for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering.
verses.kjv: Thus shall Aaron come into the holy place: with a young bullock for a sin offering, and a ram for a burnt offering.
verses.bsb: This is how Aaron is to enter the Holy Place: with a young bull for a sin offering and a ram for a burnt offering.

verses.esv: He shall put on the holy linen coat and shall have the linen undergarment on his body, and he shall tie the linen sash around his waist, and wear the linen turban; these are the holy garments. He shall bathe his body in water and then put them on.
verses.kjv: He shall put on the holy linen coat, and he shall have the linen breeches upon his flesh, and shall be girded with a linen girdle, and with the linen mitre shall he be attired: these are holy garments; therefore shall he wash his flesh in water, and so put them on.
verses.bsb: He is to wear the sacred linen tunic, with linen undergarments. He must tie a linen sash around him and put on the linen turban. These are holy garments, and he must bathe himself with water before he wears them.

verses.esv: And he shall take from the congregation of the people of Israel two male goats for a sin offering, and one ram for a burnt offering.
verses.kjv: And he shall take of the congregation of the children of Israel two kids of the goats for a sin offering, and one ram for a burnt offering.
verses.bsb: And he shall take from the congregation of Israel two male goats for a sin offering and one ram for a burnt offering.

verses.esv: “Aaron shall offer the bull as a sin offering for himself and shall make atonement for himself and for his house.
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall offer his bullock of the sin offering, which is for himself, and make an atonement for himself, and for his house.
verses.bsb: Aaron is to present the bull for his sin offering and make atonement for himself and his household.

verses.esv: Then he shall take the two goats and set them before the LORD at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
verses.kjv: And he shall take the two goats, and present them before the Lord at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: Then he shall take the two goats and present them before the LORD at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.

verses.esv: And Aaron shall cast lots over the two goats, one lot for the LORD and the other lot for Azazel.
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall cast lots upon the two goats; one lot for the Lord, and the other lot for the scapegoat.
verses.bsb: After Aaron casts lots for the two goats, one for the LORD and the other for the scapegoat,

verses.esv: And Aaron shall present the goat on which the lot fell for the LORD and use it as a sin offering,
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall bring the goat upon which the Lord’s lot fell, and offer him for a sin offering.
verses.bsb: he shall present the goat chosen by lot for the LORD and sacrifice it as a sin offering.

verses.esv: but the goat on which the lot fell for Azazel shall be presented alive before the LORD to make atonement over it, that it may be sent away into the wilderness to Azazel.
verses.kjv: But the goat, on which the lot fell to be the scapegoat, shall be presented alive before the Lord, to make an atonement with him, and to let him go for a scapegoat into the wilderness.
verses.bsb: But the goat chosen by lot as the scapegoat shall be presented alive before the LORD to make atonement by sending it into the wilderness as the scapegoat.

verses.esv: “Aaron shall present the bull as a sin offering for himself, and shall make atonement for himself and for his house. He shall kill the bull as a sin offering for himself.
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall bring the bullock of the sin offering, which is for himself, and shall make an atonement for himself, and for his house, and shall kill the bullock of the sin offering which is for himself:
verses.bsb: When Aaron presents the bull for his sin offering and makes atonement for himself and his household, he is to slaughter the bull for his own sin offering.

verses.esv: And he shall take a censer full of coals of fire from the altar before the LORD, and two handfuls of sweet incense beaten small, and he shall bring it inside the veil
verses.kjv: And he shall take a censer full of burning coals of fire from off the altar before the Lord, and his hands full of sweet incense beaten small, and bring it within the vail:
verses.bsb: Then he must take a censer full of burning coals from the altar before the LORD, and two handfuls of finely ground fragrant incense, and take them inside the veil.

verses.esv: and put the incense on the fire before the LORD, that the cloud of the incense may cover the mercy seat that is over the testimony, so that he does not die.
verses.kjv: And he shall put the incense upon the fire before the Lord, that the cloud of the incense may cover the mercy seat that is upon the testimony, that he die not:
verses.bsb: He is to put the incense on the fire before the LORD, and the cloud of incense will cover the mercy seat above the Testimony, so that he will not die.

verses.esv: And he shall take some of the blood of the bull and sprinkle it with his finger on the front of the mercy seat on the east side, and in front of the mercy seat he shall sprinkle some of the blood with his finger seven times.
verses.kjv: And he shall take of the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it with his finger upon the mercy seat eastward; and before the mercy seat shall he sprinkle of the blood with his finger seven times.
verses.bsb: And he is to take some of the bull’s blood and sprinkle it with his finger on the east side of the mercy seat; then he shall sprinkle some of it with his finger seven times before the mercy seat.

verses.esv: “Then he shall kill the goat of the sin offering that is for the people and bring its blood inside the veil and do with its blood as he did with the blood of the bull, sprinkling it over the mercy seat and in front of the mercy seat.
verses.kjv: ¶ Then shall he kill the goat of the sin offering, that is for the people, and bring his blood within the vail, and do with that blood as he did with the blood of the bullock, and sprinkle it upon the mercy seat, and before the mercy seat:
verses.bsb: Aaron shall then slaughter the goat for the sin offering for the people and bring its blood behind the veil, and with its blood he must do as he did with the bull’s blood: He is to sprinkle it against the mercy seat and in front of it.

verses.esv: Thus he shall make atonement for the Holy Place, because of the uncleannesses of the people of Israel and because of their transgressions, all their sins. And so he shall do for the tent of meeting, which dwells with them in the midst of their uncleannesses.
verses.kjv: And he shall make an atonement for the holy place, because of the uncleanness of the children of Israel, and because of their transgressions in all their sins: and so shall he do for the tabernacle of the congregation, that remaineth among them in the midst of their uncleanness.
verses.bsb: So he shall make atonement for the Most Holy Place because of the impurities and rebellious acts of the Israelites in regard to all their sins. He is to do the same for the Tent of Meeting which abides among them, because it is surrounded by their impurities.

verses.esv: No one may be in the tent of meeting from the time he enters to make atonement in the Holy Place until he comes out and has made atonement for himself and for his house and for all the assembly of Israel.
verses.kjv: And there shall be no man in the tabernacle of the congregation when he goeth in to make an atonement in the holy place, until he come out, and have made an atonement for himself, and for his household, and for all the congregation of Israel.
verses.bsb: No one may be in the Tent of Meeting from the time Aaron goes in to make atonement in the Most Holy Place until he leaves, after he has made atonement for himself, his household, and the whole assembly of Israel.

verses.esv: Then he shall go out to the altar that is before the LORD and make atonement for it, and shall take some of the blood of the bull and some of the blood of the goat, and put it on the horns of the altar all around.
verses.kjv: And he shall go out unto the altar that is before the Lord, and make an atonement for it; and shall take of the blood of the bullock, and of the blood of the goat, and put it upon the horns of the altar round about.
verses.bsb: Then he shall go out to the altar that is before the LORD and make atonement for it. He is to take some of the bull’s blood and some of the goat’s blood and put it on all the horns of the altar.

verses.esv: And he shall sprinkle some of the blood on it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it and consecrate it from the uncleannesses of the people of Israel.
verses.kjv: And he shall sprinkle of the blood upon it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it, and hallow it from the uncleanness of the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: He is to sprinkle some of the blood on it with his finger seven times to cleanse it and consecrate it from the uncleanness of the Israelites.

verses.esv: “And when he has made an end of atoning for the Holy Place and the tent of meeting and the altar, he shall present the live goat.
verses.kjv: ¶ And when he hath made an end of reconciling the holy place, and the tabernacle of the congregation, and the altar, he shall bring the live goat:
verses.bsb: When Aaron has finished purifying the Most Holy Place, the Tent of Meeting, and the altar, he is to bring forward the live goat.

verses.esv: And Aaron shall lay both his hands on the head of the live goat, and confess over it all the iniquities of the people of Israel, and all their transgressions, all their sins. And he shall put them on the head of the goat and send it away into the wilderness by the hand of a man who is in readiness.
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall lay both his hands upon the head of the live goat, and confess over him all the iniquities of the children of Israel, and all their transgressions in all their sins, putting them upon the head of the goat, and shall send him away by the hand of a fit man into the wilderness:
verses.bsb: Then he is to lay both hands on the head of the live goat and confess over it all the iniquities and rebellious acts of the Israelites in regard to all their sins. He is to put them on the goat’s head and send it away into the wilderness by the hand of a man appointed for the task.

verses.esv: The goat shall bear all their iniquities on itself to a remote area, and he shall let the goat go free in the wilderness.
verses.kjv: And the goat shall bear upon him all their iniquities unto a land not inhabited: and he shall let go the goat in the wilderness.
verses.bsb: The goat will carry on itself all their iniquities into a solitary place, and the man will release it into the wilderness.

verses.esv: “Then Aaron shall come into the tent of meeting and shall take off the linen garments that he put on when he went into the Holy Place and shall leave them there.
verses.kjv: And Aaron shall come into the tabernacle of the congregation, and shall put off the linen garments, which he put on when he went into the holy place, and shall leave them there:
verses.bsb: Then Aaron is to enter the Tent of Meeting, take off the linen garments he put on before entering the Most Holy Place, and leave them there.

verses.esv: And he shall bathe his body in water in a holy place and put on his garments and come out and offer his burnt offering and the burnt offering of the people and make atonement for himself and for the people.
verses.kjv: And he shall wash his flesh with water in the holy place, and put on his garments, and come forth, and offer his burnt offering, and the burnt offering of the people, and make an atonement for himself, and for the people.
verses.bsb: He is to bathe himself with water in a holy place and put on his own clothes. Then he must go out and sacrifice his burnt offering and the people’s burnt offering to make atonement for himself and for the people.

verses.esv: And the fat of the sin offering he shall burn on the altar.
verses.kjv: And the fat of the sin offering shall he burn upon the altar.
verses.bsb: He is also to burn the fat of the sin offering on the altar.

verses.esv: And he who lets the goat go to Azazel shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
verses.kjv: And he that let go the goat for the scapegoat shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward come into the camp.
verses.bsb: The man who released the goat as the scapegoat must wash his clothes and bathe himself with water; afterward he may reenter the camp.

verses.esv: And the bull for the sin offering and the goat for the sin offering, whose blood was brought in to make atonement in the Holy Place, shall be carried outside the camp. Their skin and their flesh and their dung shall be burned up with fire.
verses.kjv: And the bullock for the sin offering, and the goat for the sin offering, whose blood was brought in to make atonement in the holy place, shall one carry forth without the camp; and they shall burn in the fire their skins, and their flesh, and their dung.
verses.bsb: The bull for the sin offering and the goat for the sin offering, whose blood was brought into the Most Holy Place to make atonement, must be taken outside the camp; and their hides, flesh, and dung must be burned up.

verses.esv: And he who burns them shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.
verses.kjv: And he that burneth them shall wash his clothes, and bathe his flesh in water, and afterward he shall come into the camp.
verses.bsb: The one who burns them must wash his clothes and bathe himself with water, and afterward he may reenter the camp.

verses.esv: “And it shall be a statute to you forever that in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, you shall afflict yourselves and shall do no work, either the native or the stranger who sojourns among you.
verses.kjv: ¶ And this shall be a statute for ever unto you: that in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, ye shall afflict your souls, and do no work at all, whether it be one of your own country, or a stranger that sojourneth among you:
verses.bsb: This is to be a permanent statute for you: On the tenth day of the seventh month, you shall humble yourselves and not do any work—whether the native or the foreigner who resides among you—

verses.esv: For on this day shall atonement be made for you to cleanse you. You shall be clean before the LORD from all your sins.
verses.kjv: For on that day shall the priest make an atonement for you, to cleanse you, that ye may be clean from all your sins before the Lord.
verses.bsb: because on this day atonement will be made for you to cleanse you, and you will be clean from all your sins before the LORD.

verses.esv: It is a Sabbath of solemn rest to you, and you shall afflict yourselves; it is a statute forever.
verses.kjv: It shall be a sabbath of rest unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls, by a statute for ever.
verses.bsb: It is a Sabbath of complete rest for you, that you may humble yourselves; it is a permanent statute.

verses.esv: And the priest who is anointed and consecrated as priest in his father's place shall make atonement, wearing the holy linen garments.
verses.kjv: And the priest, whom he shall anoint, and whom he shall consecrate to minister in the priest’s office in his father’s stead, shall make the atonement, and shall put on the linen clothes, even the holy garments:
verses.bsb: The priest who is anointed and ordained to succeed his father as high priest shall make atonement. He will put on the sacred linen garments

verses.esv: He shall make atonement for the holy sanctuary, and he shall make atonement for the tent of meeting and for the altar, and he shall make atonement for the priests and for all the people of the assembly.
verses.kjv: And he shall make an atonement for the holy sanctuary, and he shall make an atonement for the tabernacle of the congregation, and for the altar, and he shall make an atonement for the priests, and for all the people of the congregation.
verses.bsb: and make atonement for the Most Holy Place, the Tent of Meeting, and the altar, and for the priests and all the people of the assembly.

verses.esv: And this shall be a statute forever for you, that atonement may be made for the people of Israel once in the year because of all their sins.” And Aaron did as the LORD commanded Moses.
verses.kjv: And this shall be an everlasting statute unto you, to make an atonement for the children of Israel for all their sins once a year. And he did as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: This is to be a permanent statute for you, to make atonement once a year for the Israelites because of all their sins.”  And all this was done as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.esv: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.esv: “Speak to Aaron and his sons and to all the people of Israel and say to them, This is the thing that the LORD has commanded.
verses.kjv: Speak unto Aaron, and unto his sons, and unto all the children of Israel, and say unto them; This is the thing which the Lord hath commanded, saying,
verses.bsb: “Speak to Aaron, his sons, and all the Israelites and tell them this is what the LORD has commanded:

verses.esv: If any one of the house of Israel kills an ox or a lamb or a goat in the camp, or kills it outside the camp,
verses.kjv: What man soever there be of the house of Israel, that killeth an ox, or lamb, or goat, in the camp, or that killeth it out of the camp,
verses.bsb: ‘Anyone from the house of Israel who slaughters an ox, a lamb, or a goat in the camp or outside of it

verses.esv: and does not bring it to the entrance of the tent of meeting to offer it as a gift to the LORD in front of the tabernacle of the LORD, bloodguilt shall be imputed to that man. He has shed blood, and that man shall be cut off from among his people.
verses.kjv: And bringeth it not unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, to offer an offering unto the Lord before the tabernacle of the Lord; blood shall be imputed unto that man; he hath shed blood; and that man shall be cut off from among his people:
verses.bsb: instead of bringing it to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting to present it as an offering to the LORD before His tabernacle—that man shall incur bloodguilt. He has shed blood and must be cut off from among his people.

verses.esv: This is to the end that the people of Israel may bring their sacrifices that they sacrifice in the open field, that they may bring them to the LORD, to the priest at the entrance of the tent of meeting, and sacrifice them as sacrifices of peace offerings to the LORD.
verses.kjv: To the end that the children of Israel may bring their sacrifices, which they offer in the open field, even that they may bring them unto the Lord, unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, unto the priest, and offer them for peace offerings unto the Lord.
verses.bsb: For this reason the Israelites will bring to the LORD the sacrifices they have been offering in the open fields. They are to bring them to the priest at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting and offer them as sacrifices of peace to the LORD.

verses.esv: And the priest shall throw the blood on the altar of the LORD at the entrance of the tent of meeting and burn the fat for a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
verses.kjv: And the priest shall sprinkle the blood upon the altar of the Lord at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and burn the fat for a sweet savour unto the Lord.
verses.bsb: The priest will then sprinkle the blood on the altar of the LORD at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting and burn the fat as a pleasing aroma to the LORD.

verses.esv: So they shall no more sacrifice their sacrifices to goat demons, after whom they whore. This shall be a statute forever for them throughout their generations.
verses.kjv: And they shall no more offer their sacrifices unto devils, after whom they have gone a whoring. This shall be a statute for ever unto them throughout their generations.
verses.bsb: They must no longer offer their sacrifices to the goat demons to which they have prostituted themselves. This will be a permanent statute for them for the generations to come.’

verses.esv: “And you shall say to them, Any one of the house of Israel, or of the strangers who sojourn among them, who offers a burnt offering or sacrifice
verses.kjv: ¶ And thou shalt say unto them, Whatsoever man there be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers which sojourn among you, that offereth a burnt offering or sacrifice,
verses.bsb: Tell them that if anyone from the house of Israel or any foreigner living among them offers a burnt offering or a sacrifice

verses.esv: and does not bring it to the entrance of the tent of meeting to offer it to the LORD, that man shall be cut off from his people.
verses.kjv: And bringeth it not unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, to offer it unto the Lord; even that man shall be cut off from among his people.
verses.bsb: but does not bring it to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting to sacrifice it to the LORD, that man must be cut off from his people.

verses.esv: “If any one of the house of Israel or of the strangers who sojourn among them eats any blood, I will set my face against that person who eats blood and will cut him off from among his people.
verses.kjv: ¶ And whatsoever man there be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among you, that eateth any manner of blood; I will even set my face against that soul that eateth blood, and will cut him off from among his people.
verses.bsb: If anyone from the house of Israel or a foreigner living among them eats any blood, I will set My face against that person and cut him off from among his people.

verses.esv: For the life of the flesh is in the blood, and I have given it for you on the altar to make atonement for your souls, for it is the blood that makes atonement by the life.
verses.kjv: For the life of the flesh is in the blood: and I have given it to you upon the altar to make an atonement for your souls: for it is the blood that maketh an atonement for the soul.
verses.bsb: For the life of the flesh is in the blood, and I have given it to you to make atonement for your souls upon the altar; for it is the blood that makes atonement for the soul.

verses.esv: Therefore I have said to the people of Israel, No person among you shall eat blood, neither shall any stranger who sojourns among you eat blood.
verses.kjv: Therefore I said unto the children of Israel, No soul of you shall eat blood, neither shall any stranger that sojourneth among you eat blood.
verses.bsb: Therefore I say to the Israelites, ‘None of you may eat blood, nor may any foreigner living among you eat blood.’

verses.esv: “Any one also of the people of Israel, or of the strangers who sojourn among them, who takes in hunting any beast or bird that may be eaten shall pour out its blood and cover it with earth.
verses.kjv: And whatsoever man there be of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn among you, which hunteth and catcheth any beast or fowl that may be eaten; he shall even pour out the blood thereof, and cover it with dust.
verses.bsb: And if any Israelite or foreigner living among them hunts down a wild animal or bird that may be eaten, he must drain its blood and cover it with dirt.

verses.esv: For the life of every creature is its blood: its blood is its life. Therefore I have said to the people of Israel, You shall not eat the blood of any creature, for the life of every creature is its blood. Whoever eats it shall be cut off.
verses.kjv: For it is the life of all flesh; the blood of it is for the life thereof: therefore I said unto the children of Israel, Ye shall eat the blood of no manner of flesh: for the life of all flesh is the blood thereof: whosoever eateth it shall be cut off.
verses.bsb: For the life of all flesh is its blood. Therefore I have told the Israelites, ‘You must not eat the blood of any living thing, because the life of all flesh is its blood; whoever eats it must be cut off.’

verses.esv: And every person who eats what dies of itself or what is torn by beasts, whether he is a native or a sojourner, shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening; then he shall be clean.
